purpose: Candidate-only high-resolution retrieval and archive control.
main_repository_policy: No raw source tiles or native-resolution candidate mosaics are committed to normal Git history.
archive_backend: private GitHub Release asset, or an explicitly selected private external archive.
privacy_gate: Do not upload candidate high-resolution packages to a public repository.
candidate_package_contents: source-tile manifest with URLs and SHA256
note: This file is a policy and queue definition only. It contains no candidate image.
